reasoning: I will not vote for a promise that sits on paper while my mother-in-law waits five years. Shantanu says fourteen certificates in five days before the election means CAA is working — but fourteen is not thousands, and fourteen is not my in-laws. The Swasthya Sathi card works. The ration comes. These are TMC schemes, and they keep my family safe every month, not just in campaign season. I am not happy with Sandeshkhali or the corruption I have seen — any government with loose power hurts people. But I vote for what I can hold in my hand, not what I am promised will come later. The schemes that protect this family are real today; the CAA documents are still paper.
primary_drivers: Swasthya Sathi and Khadya Sathi schemes are working tangibly under TMC
CAA has been promised since 2019 with minimal delivery; fourteen certificates do not represent thousands or her family's actual papers
Fear of NRC-like instability; Mamata's 'no NRC' reassures more than promises of CAA implementation
